title: Pre-flight: single-asset mean-reversion (buy-the-valley) net of cost
source: CEO question 2026-05-31: a formula to sell on a drop and buy back cheaper in the valley (mean-reversion) net of transaction costs. Step (1) of a 2-step plan; step (2) is a cost-aware no-trade rebalancing band (separate B-ID).
why: Mean-reversion is a DIFFERENT bet than the directional trend/macro/regime nulls and the TSMOM momentum we buried (B0116/B0102) — it had not been tested as alpha. Cheap to falsify before any build, with the discipline the B0102 closure taught (pre-registered tests, no grid).
value_rationale: M: closes the mean-reversion avenue with a number and settles the CEO's buy-the-valley intuition; the VR/half-life/cost-gate harness is reusable.
scope: Variance Ratio (Lo-MacKinlay 1988, heteroskedasticity-robust z*) at q in {2,5,10,21,63}.
Lag-1 autocorr + OU half-life on deviation-from-MA21.
Pre-registered contrarian z-score backtest (no grid) NET of the book's per-side cost.
recommendation: DISCARD — no tradeable valley. Findings (scripts/preflight_mean_reversion.py): (1) In the DEPLOYED crypto-era regime, ZERO assets show significant mean-reversion (|z*|<1.96 everywhere; strongest SOL z*~-1.5). (2) Only USDJPY clears significance and only on 28y full history at q=2,5 (z*~-2.0..-2.2) — vanishes in the deployed regime. (3) The pre-registered contrarian rule is NEGATIVE net of cost on 6/8 assets (worst = USDJPY -0.36, exactly where reversion is most 'significant' — the tiny rho1=-0.035 reversal cannot pay 971 trades' cost); positive only XAG +0.17 and SOL +0.26, BOTH below the +0.3 bar and SOL on just 80 trades. CONSTRUCTIVE COROLLARY: assets are MILDLY MEAN-REVERTING (VR<1, rho1<0), NOT trending — which independently validates the no-momentum survival-book design and explains why the sleeve (B0116) and TSMOM (B0102) failed. The mild reversion is real but too weak to harvest net of cost as an active signal; it is best harvested PASSIVELY via lazy rebalancing -> motivates the cost-aware no-trade band (step 2).
out_of_scope: Pairs/cointegration mean-reversion (cross-asset spreads), intraday/overnight reversal (no sub-daily data wired), and the cost-aware rebalancing band (own B-ID).

external_refs.label: VR + OU half-life + pre-registered contrarian net-of-cost backtest
